name: Bilal Rehman
summary: Full Stack Developer with 7+ years of experience building scalable web and mobile applications. Hands-on expertise in React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, Python, and AI/ML integration. Delivered production systems across fintech, SaaS, and consumer apps with measurable business impact.

experience.title: AI Engineer & Consultant
bullets: Designed and developed an AI-driven multi-agent investment research platform for a fintech client, cutting analyst research time by 90% and enabling same-day deal decisions
Built a voice cloning and speech synthesis platform achieving 95% accuracy from 3–10 seconds of audio — delivered to a media client as a production SaaS product
Architected end-to-end ML pipelines integrating LLMs with real-time market data feeds, reducing data processing latency from 8 minutes to under 30 seconds

experience.title: Senior Full Stack Developer
bullets: Owned end-to-end delivery of a cloud-based auto repair shop management SaaS platform, increasing operational efficiency by 70% across 200+ partner shops
Redesigned the customer-facing UI/UX as part of a 4-engineer squad, resulting in a 25% increase in user engagement and a 15% reduction in support tickets
Built and maintained RESTful APIs in Node.js and Express serving 50k daily active users, maintaining 99.9% uptime across peak periods

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
bullets: Delivered a cross-platform family task management app in React Native across a 5-person team, achieving a 4.6-star App Store rating within 3 months of launch
Integrated AR features, social sharing, and in-app e-commerce into the mobile product, driving a 40% increase in daily active users over 6 months
Implemented end-to-end data encryption and Firebase Auth flows that passed a third-party security audit with zero critical findings

experience.title: Frontend Developer
bullets: Built and maintained a React.js property listing platform used by 30k monthly visitors, with integrated mapping APIs and real-time availability updates
Created a shared UI component library adopted across 3 product teams, reducing interface development time by 35% and ensuring design consistency
Implemented performance optimisations — lazy loading, code splitting, image compression — that reduced page load time by 40% and improved Lighthouse scores from 58 to 91
Collaborated with UX designers and the product owner to ship 6 major feature releases on schedule across a 2.5-year tenure
